pr.title: Replit support (replit.com/~ import)
pr.body:
Adds configuration to run on [Replit](https://replit.com/~) and binds **Replit Agent** policy to the same rules as **CLAUDE.md**, **AGENTS.md**, **`.cursor/rules/`**, and **`.coderabbit.yaml`**. ### Replit Agent (see `replit.md`) - Prominent **indicator** block: Replit AI must not use a separate/weaker policy. - Policy table linking all authoritative sources. - `.replit` comment + CodeRabbit `path_instructions` for `replit.md`. ### Files | File | Purpose | |------|---------| | `.replit` / `replit.nix` | Run/compile + Nix deps | | `replit.md` | Onboarding + **agent policy** | | `docs/replit.md`, `nix/deps.json`, `flake.nix` | Docs and Nix manifest | | `version/entries/4_1_0_replit_support.ver` | PRERELEASE entry |
  
## Summary by CodeRabbit * **New Features** * Added Replit platform support, allowing users to import and run the project directly from GitHub via Replit. * **Documentation** * Updated build and run instructions with Replit setup guidance. * Added comprehensive Replit-specific onboarding documentation, including platform requirements and dependencies. * **Chores** * Bumped build version to 4.1.0 BUILD 3. [![Review Change Stack](https://storage.googleapis.com/coderabbit_public_assets/review-stack-in-coderabbit-ui.svg)](https://app.coderabbit.ai/change-stack/BPForbes/Bailey-Forbes-Flinstone/pull/164?utm_source=github_walkthrough&utm_medium=github&utm_campaign=change_stack)
pr.author: BPForbes
